name: hapbench-oracle-overrides
description: Manual ground-truth overrides for HapBench cases whose original files do not annotate sink labels.

Lifecycle Modeling/ComponentLifecycle3.reason: EntryAbility writes the source in onWindowStageCreate and Index.aboutToRecycle logs EntryAbility.info.

OpenHarmony Specific APIs/CallbackInSour.reason: sim.getSimAccountInfo callback result is treated as source in HapFlow sources.json and flows to hilog.info.

OpenHarmony Specific APIs/DirectLeak-wan.reason: onCreate(want, ...) first parameter is treated as a sensitive source in HapFlow sources.json and is logged directly.
